title: Cute squid totem pack
description: This is a totem resource pack that only changes the look of the totem and nothing else. The totems are very CUTE!!!
body:
This resource pack doesn't change anything about the use of the totem of undying but only the look of them. 
If you don't like the totem that's your Minecraft skin, try these cute little ones. There will be more totems coming up!!!

Q&A:
Can I showcase it in my video?
-Yes.
Is it compatible with my other resource pack?
-If it doesn't mess with the texture of the totem, then yes.
Can I use it in my modpack?
-Yes.

**Note: You can safely ignore the incompatible error!!!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AMCEr_EM9NM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Check out my other totem packs as well!!!
